name: EC2 Instance Type Change
description: Change EC2 instance types for better performance, cost optimization, or new features

template.description: Changing EC2 instance type from {{currentType}} to {{targetType}} for {{instanceCount}} instances in Auto Scaling Group. Current average CPU utilization: {{avgCPU}}%. Migration will use rolling update strategy to maintain availability. Testing application compatibility with new instance type and validating performance improvements.
template.currentState: Auto Scaling Group with {{instanceCount}} {{currentType}} instances across 3 AZs. Current CPU: {{avgCPU}}%, Memory: 70%. Application load balanced via ALB. Health checks every 30 seconds. Deployment uses blue-green strategy.
template.proposedState: Launch template updated to {{targetType}}. Rolling update with 25% batch size and 5-minute wait between batches. New instances tested in staging environment. CloudWatch alarms for CPU, memory, and application metrics. Rollback plan prepared.
template.trafficPatterns: Production web application serving 24/7 traffic. Peak load during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM). Auto-scaling based on CPU (target 70%). Average request rate: 5000 req/min. Response time SLA: 500ms p99.
